heading: Exclusive right to name
label: 21904 Exclusive right to name
text: The corporation and its State and local branches and subdivisions have the exclusive right to use the name “The American National Theater and Academy”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2190436:3305., .July 5, 1935, ch. 373, § 549 Stat. 458The word “sole” is omitted as included in “exclusive”. The words “to have” are omitted as included in “to use”. The words “in carrying out its purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
